**what's this?**

end-4's [dots-hyprland](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland) but with my own tweaks. I'm using this fork to:

- add support for more init systems (not just systemd)
- POTENTIALLY expand distro compatibility
- maybe optimize a few things here and there

it's purely personal, so **please don't submit issues here**. if something's broken, try the original repo first. PRs? No reason to.

**installation**

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Corderstriker/dotz-hyprland.git ~/.config/dotz-hyprland
cd ~/.config/dotz-hyprland
./setup install
```

**thanks**

original creator [end-4](https://github.com/end-4) and everyone who helped. go sponsor them if you can!
